content:
I have a lot of feedback to give on the roc_language_server, and a lot of ideas for the future.

Does it make sense to create a language_server channel on Zulip that we can use to collect that feedback, ideas, and collaboration?
I don't think we need one. I'd prefer to keep ideas and proposals in this channel.

Hmm, I feel like if we make a channel for the language server, that opens the door to a lot of other channels e.g. wasm, webdev, gamedev, nix... those things are not quite like the language server but still...
Maybe we should add a feedback channel and leave the rest for ideas and contributing.
At least for now... in future there may be way too much discussion and it needs to be separated.
Anthony Bullard has marked this topic as resolved.
@Anthony Bullard feel free to start any language server ideas with lang_srv: and @ me :) that should help with locating them
